mapper.sql: select job_notice_id, job_id, job_name, notice_content, notice_target, create_time, batch_date, if_handle from sys_job_notice
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_job_notice( job_notice_id, job_id, job_name, notice_content, notice_target, batch_date, if_handle, create_time )values
( #{jobNotice.jobNoticeId}, #{jobNotice.jobId}, #{jobNotice.jobName}, #{jobNotice.noticeContent}, #{jobNotice.noticeTarget}, #{jobNotice.batchDate}, #{jobNotice.ifHandle}, sysdate() )
